name: Woven Lounge Chair - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add a touch of rustic charm to your home with this Simple Rustic Woven Lounge Chair from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This armchair features a rectangular seat and back with a distinctive woven design that bring textured style to your space. With a light bronn silhouette and a rubberwood frame, this lounge chair fits easily into your living room, study, or any cozy corner where you want to relax.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 26 inches
Overall Height: 31.8 inches
Overall Depth: 29.9 inches
Distance from floor to top of arm: 23.2 inches
Distance from floor to top of seat: 16.2 inches
Distance between front legs: 22.8 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 24.7 inches
Seat depth: 20.8 inches
